overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Last of Us showing Joel, Ellie, and Tess walking through a flooded post-apocalyptic Boston street toward the Massachusetts State House. The scene transitions from dry pavement to deep water with submerged vehicles, featuring overgrown vegetation and historic architecture reclaimed by nature.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban street approaching flooded plaza

events.description: transition from dry pavement to flooded street area

agents.ego_description: Joel walking with rifle on back, following companions toward the flooded area ahead

notable_agents.action: Ellie walking ahead toward the flooded street

entered.detail: Historic government building with prominent golden dome visible in the distance
Red brick multi-story building with fire escapes and overgrown ivy
Derelict yellow taxi cab parked on the street with rust and vegetation growth
Black wrought iron fence running along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dry abandoned Boston street with Joel following Ellie and Tess. The Massachusetts State House with its golden dome dominates the distant view. The group walks past a derelict yellow taxi and brick buildings overgrown with vegetation, approaching a flooded area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban plaza with submerged vehicles

events.description: entering knee-deep water covering the former street surface
slowing pace to wade through deeper water between submerged cars

agents.ego_description: Joel wading through the flooded street following Ellie between submerged vehicles

notable_agents.action: Ellie wading through water ahead toward the stone gazebo

entered.detail: Partially submerged sedan car visible in the flood water
Circular stone gazebo with columns standing in the flooded plaza
Modern glass and steel skyscraper visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The group enters the flooded portion of the city, wading through knee-deep water past submerged vehicles. The stone gazebo becomes visible in the plaza ahead while the State House grows larger in the frame. Vegetation reeds and lily pads float in the water as the characters navigate between derelict cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded memorial plaza with large stone monument

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the large stone monument relief sculpture against the sky
camera returns to forward facing position, continuing through the water

agents.ego_description: Joel pausing to look up at the monument's relief sculpture while wading in the water

notable_agents.action: Ellie continuing to wade toward the gazebo structure ahead

entered.detail: Large curved stone memorial wall with intricate relief sculptures
Detailed stone carving depicting figures and horses on the monument wall

segments.scene_description: Approaching a large stone monument on the left, the camera tilts up to reveal an elaborate relief sculpture backlit by the sun. Joel observes the memorial while continuing to wade through the water. The State House shifts to the right side of the frame as the group moves past the monument toward the central gazebo.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded approach to Massachusetts State House entrance

events.description: approaching the columned entrance and steps of the State House

agents.ego_description: Joel wading toward the Massachusetts State House entrance steps through the remaining flood water

notable_agents.action: Ellie approaching the State House entrance steps ahead

entered.detail: Columned entrance portico of the State House with stairs leading up from the water
Large concrete block partially submerged in the water near the building

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the group wading toward the Massachusetts State House entrance. The building now dominates the center of the frame with its columns and golden dome clearly visible. Having passed the monument and gazebo, the characters approach the concrete steps where the flood water meets the historic building's entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a derelict Boston street that transforms from a dry urban ruin into a flooded plaza leading to a historic landmark. It begins on dry pavement where Joel follows Ellie and Tess past a derelict yellow taxi and overgrown brick buildings, with the golden dome of the Massachusetts State House visible in the distance. As the group advances, the terrain shifts into a flooded zone where they wade through knee-deep water filled with lily pads and submerged vehicles, moving toward a stone gazebo. The camera then tilts up to reveal an elaborate, sun-backlit relief sculpture on a large stone monument before the State House shifts to the right of the frame. Finally, the scene opens up as the group passes the monument and gazebo, wading directly toward the concrete steps and columns of the State House entrance.
